caption: A man with a shaved head and a full dark beard is positioned in front of a professional microphone in a studio setting. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt, and tattoos are visible on his right arm. The background consists of grey acoustic foam panels. The microphone is mounted on a boom arm that features the white text "Rode PSA1". Across the sequence, the man is speaking, his mouth opening and closing as he looks slightly to his left. His expression remains relatively consistent, though his jaw moves with the rhythm of his speech. The camera remains static, capturing him from the chest up, while the lighting and background remain unchanged throughout the clip.
